changes.description: Added admin enrollment management screens and endpoints
details: Added screen: admin_enrollment_list (/admin/enrollments) — list all enrollments with filters and search
Added screen: admin_enrollment_detail (/admin/enrollments/:enrollmentId) — view full enrollment details, cancel or complete
Added Zod schemas: AdminEnrollmentListQuery, AdminEnrollmentListResponse, AdminEnrollmentDetailResponse, UpdateEnrollmentStatusRequest
Added state matrix entries for both new screens including custom states for cancellation and invalid transitions
changes.reason: BLK-01: Global navigation listed 'Enrollments' for admin role but no module provided backing screens or endpoints

changes.description: Confirmed assumption ET-A-02: instant enrollment for MVP
details: Admin can cancel enrollments after the fact via the new PATCH /api/enrollments/:enrollmentId/status endpoint
changes.reason: BLK-02: User confirmed instant enrollment without approval flow for MVP
